backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for Students, Instructors, Aircraft, Exercises, and FlightLogs with in-memory Map storage, plus CSV export and reporting functions for aggregated flight hours by student and instructor.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for entity management, flight log entry/editing/deletion, reporting, and CSV export with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality in the flight logbook application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode design tokens for the aviation-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component with tabbed navigation for flight entry, logs, reports, and export, plus entity management dialogs and state management for editing flight logs.
Reusable dialog component for creating students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises with dynamic form fields based on entity type and UUID generation.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Button component that fetches CSV data from backend and triggers browser download with date-stamped filename.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogForm.ts: Form component for creating and editing flight log entries with fields for date, student, instructor, aircraft, exercise, flight type, landing details, and times. Handles form submission, validation, and calculates total flight hours.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogTable.t: Table component that displays all flight log entries with columns for date, student, instructor, aircraft, exercise, flight details, and hours. Provides edit and delete actions with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/InstructorReport: Report component that displays a table of instructors with their total flight hours and flight count aggregated from flight logs.
frontend/src/components/StudentReport.ts: Report component that displays a table of students with their total flight hours aggregated from flight logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, creating authenticated or anonymous actors and invalidating queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEntities.ts: Custom hooks for fetching all students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises from the backend, plus a mutation hook for creating new entities of each type.
frontend/src/hooks/useFlightLogs.ts: Custom hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting flight logs, with automatic resolution of foreign key IDs to display names using entity data.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, providing login/logout functionality, identity state, and authentication status tracking with AuthClient integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: Provides React Query hooks (useStudentReport and useInstructorReport) that fetch and aggregate flight hours and flight counts for students and instructors from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, including colors for UI components, charts, and design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/timeCalculations.ts: Utility functions for parsing time strings (HH:MM), formatting minutes to human-readable format, and calculating flight duration between takeoff and landing times including midnight crossover handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH variables, container settings, border radius tokens, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a Pilot Flight Logbook application with single-file architecture, CSV-based persistence, and features for flight tracking, entity management (students/instructors/aircraft/exercises), and reporting.
